【now.com體育】英國報章報道，曼聯前鋒安東尼馬迪爾已拒絕了會方的新約條件，並引來以意甲祖雲達斯為首的歐洲列強爭相羅致。

曼聯在今季中引入阿歷斯山齊士，跟中鋒盧卡古均是領隊摩連奴的愛將，加上小將拉舒福特，進一步削弱安東尼馬迪爾（Anthony Martial）於曼聯的正選地位。亦有有報道指，摩佬一直有意羅致與馬迪爾位置相近的皇家馬德里翼鋒加里夫巴利，或者車路士攻擊球員韋利安，這對馬迪爾的紅魔前途更加不利。

英國多家傳媒於周二爆料，萌生去意的馬迪爾已經拒絕了曼聯提出續約新約的要求，並打算於今夏離隊他投，尋求更多上陣時間。消息傳出後，據悉意甲祖雲達斯、法甲巴黎聖日耳門、西甲馬德里體育會，以至英超熱刺等勁旅，都對收購這名22歲射手感到興趣。

當中以祖記對購入馬迪爾最為殷切，因為這支意甲班霸的主將保羅戴巴拿現時被列強虎視眈眈，而希古恩、文迪蘇傑兩名射手均已年過30，意味球隊需要著手為鋒線進行換血，而年輕具潛質優勢的安東尼馬迪爾，正是他們「那杯茶」。
/

保方數5大門將 迪基亞冇份
【now.com體育】傳奇門將保方最近列出心目中現今5大門將，近年表現出色的曼聯門將迪基亞令人意外地名落孫山。

祖雲達斯門神保方（Gianluigi Buffon）今次選出5大門將，在不能偏私而選意大利同胞的情況下，揀了曼城的艾達臣摩拉斯、車路士的泰拔高圖爾斯、馬德里體育會的奧比歷、巴塞隆拿的達史特根、拜仁慕尼黑的紐亞。

「我希望我沒有忘記任何門將」保方表示。可是，近年被認為是新一代鋼門的迪基亞，竟然不入選保方的前5位；這名西班牙國腳今季於英超保持了15場清白之身，領先金手套榜，紀錄比艾達臣、高圖爾斯都好。未知保方是認為迪基亞不及以上5人，還是真的忘記了他的存在。

另外，保方雖然沒有把周三歐聯8強次回合對手皇家馬德里的基羅拿華斯放進前5位，仍大讚這名哥斯達黎加國腳：「他展示出很強的心理質素，要成為知名球隊的首席門將，真的不簡單，而且競爭十分大。」

廢老識唔識波

在上周六英超，曼聯戲劇性作客在落後2球的情況下，以3:2反勝曼城，更阻止了這支同市宿敵提早成為冠軍。拿下重要勝利，而且周中沒有比賽，領隊摩連奴決定讓球員放假2天。

保羅普巴（Paul Pogba）就約了同樣放假、在周四才出戰歐霸盃的基沙文（Antoine Griezmann）齊齊出外；普巴更把二人在車內拍的短片，上載到instagram。二人一向老友鬼鬼，早前就曾一起到美國旅行。

普巴在去年夏天力邀紅魔目標兼好友盧卡古加盟，成功後就自稱是經理人Agent P，而他亦多次表示希望跟基沙文繼法國國家隊後，於曼聯再做隊友，未知今次他會否再次Agent P上身，說服紅魔目標基沙文來投？

Marcus Rashford feels being a Mancunian in the Manchester United team gives him an extra thrill and edge to perform for the fans.

The forward, who was born and raised in Wythenshawe, south Manchester, has been at the club since the age of seven and established himself as a key member of the first team since bursting onto the scene in 2016.

During an exclusive interview with Inside United, the club’s official monthly magazine, Rashford was asked if being a local lad in the squad gives him added satisfaction and an incentive when representing the community he grew up in on the pitch.

“I think it does,” said the 20-year-old. “A lot of people have that dream, so you’re not only doing it for you; you’re doing it for a lot of people that you might not even know, but there are a lot of people who had the dream of playing for their local team when they were young.

“So I think you are playing not only for yourself and for the club, but for all the people that are living that dream through you.”

No United player has made more appearances under Jose Mourinho than Rashford, who has played in 97 matches as both a starter and a substitute since the manager began his reign in August 2016.

It's a myth-busting statistic, brought to light by ManUtd.com last month, that Rashford didn’t know about himself but takes pride from.

“I wasn’t aware of it before I saw it and it’s something to be proud of,” Marcus said. “But we always want more and we always want to show progression individually and as a team, so the numbers don’t really matter as much as the results do to me.”

EPL: Mourinho speaks on Martial leaving Manchester United

Manchester United manager, Jose Mourinho, has again insisted that he will not allow Anthony Martial leave the club.

Martial, 22, has struggled for game time in recent weeks, particularly after Alexis Sanchez’s arrival in January.


Reports in France this week, suggested Martial wants to leave Old Trafford, after growing frustrated with his role under Mourinho.

But the Manchester Evening News reports that Mourinho will not sanction the move.

The Portuguese last month insisted. he does not want to make any attacking changes in the summer.

“We have Alexis, we have Romelu Lukaku, we have Martial, we have Rashford.


“Rashford can play on the left and on the right, Alexis is exactly the same, all of them apart from Lukaku can also play from behind, they can also play as a second striker.”

“It’s bad for you [the media] because you like to have things to write and things to speculate especially in the summer, but I don’t want attacking players so don’t speak about attacking players coming here because nobody is coming here.

“Juan Mata, Lukaku, Rashford, Martial, Alexis. I don’t want attacking players so for speculation in the summer you have to go to other areas, but for attacking players I am really happy,” Mourinho said.

“We have Alexis, we have Romelu Lukaku, we have Martial, we have Rashford.


“Rashford can play on the left and on the right, Alexis is exactly the same, all of them apart from Lukaku can also play from behind, they can also play as a second striker.”

“It’s bad for you [the media] because you like to have things to write and things to speculate especially in the summer, but I don’t want attacking players so don’t speak about attacking players coming here because nobody is coming here.

“Juan Mata, Lukaku, Rashford, Martial, Alexis. I don’t want attacking players so for speculation in the summer you have to go to other areas, but for attacking players I am really happy,” Mourinho said.
